member.name: Member
member.description: Can send messages and join voice channels

moderator.name: Moderator
moderator.description: Can manage channels, messages, and voice channels

admin.name: Admin
admin.description: Can create channels and manage roles

guards.message: Only message authors can edit messages.
Only message authors or moderators can delete messages.
